title: Method and apparatus for nonlinear compensation in coherent optical links
abstract: The disclosed structures and methods are directed to a method for compensation of linear and nonlinear effects in optical fiber of a coherent optical signal transmitted through an optical link. The method comprises receiving a coherent optical signal having carriers; determining values of intensity vectors for each carrier; determining values of filtered intensity vectors for each carrier by filtering the values of the intensity vectors at frequencies lower than a cut-off frequency of a filter; determining nonlinear compensation coefficients for each carrier based on the filtered intensity vectors; and modifying the digital coherent optical signal based on the nonlinear compensation coefficients.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â compensationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â nonlinearĂ‚Â effectsĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â fiberĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â wavelengthĂ‚Â divisionĂ‚Â multiplexedĂ‚Â (WDM)Ă‚Â signalĂ‚Â transmittedĂ‚Â throughĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â link,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â comprising: receivingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â comprisingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â sub-channels;Ă‚Â digitizingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â receivedĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â generateĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â digitalĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signal; determiningĂ‚Â instantaneousĂ‚Â valuesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â intensityĂ‚Â vectorsĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â sub-channelsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â digitalĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signal; determiningĂ‚Â valuesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â filteredĂ‚Â intensityĂ‚Â vectorsĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â sub-channelsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â digitalĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â filteringĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â valuesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â intensityĂ‚Â vectorsĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â frequenciesĂ‚Â lowerĂ‚Â thanĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â cut-offĂ‚Â frequencyĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â filter,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â cut-offĂ‚Â frequencyĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â lessĂ‚Â thanĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â halfĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â sub-channelĂ‚Â bandwidth; determiningĂ‚Â nonlinearĂ‚Â compensationĂ‚Â coefficientsĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â sub-channelsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â digitalĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â filteredĂ‚Â intensityĂ‚Â vectorsĂ‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â sub-channelĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â sub-channels;Ă‚Â and modifyingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â digitalĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â coherentĂ‚Â opticalĂ‚Â signalĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â accordanceĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â determinedĂ‚Â nonlinearĂ‚Â compensationĂ‚Â coefficientsĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â filteredĂ‚Â intensityĂ‚Â vectors.
